title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: CPU+GPU inference server that runs Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, etc. via a simple CLI and REST API.

title: ollama-python
summary: First-party Python SDK that wraps the Ollama REST API for chat, embed, pull, list, and delete operations.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; identical surface to the Python SDK.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: PyPI package adding Ollama chat, embed, and completion bindings to LangChain.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Open-source ChatGPT-style web UI for any Ollama model; runs in Docker.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration that lets you use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Experimental GitHub Copilot-style VS-Code extension backed by Ollama models.

title: ollama4j
summary: Community Java/Kotlin client library published to Maven Central.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Community-maintained Ruby gem for integrating Ollama into Rails or plain Ruby apps.

title: ollama-cli-chat
summary: Rich-terminal chat client with markdown, history, and prompt templates.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hosted Discord bot that lets servers chat with local Ollama models.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Official Helm chart for running Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Bolt-based Slack bot that threads Ollama responses and supports multi-model threads.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix flake providing Ollama binary and NixOS module with systemd service.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module for CI pipelines that need to spin up Ollama containers and run model tests.

title: ollama-streamlit
summary: Streamlit chat app template that connects to local Ollama for RAG or plain chat demos.

title: ollama-curl-examples
summary: Collection of curl snippets showing every Ollama REST endpoint with JSON payloads.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate with async/await support and SSE streaming for Ollama.

title: ollama-terraform
summary: Terraform module to provision Ollama on AWS EC2 with NVIDIA GPU and model bootstrap.

title: ollama-rag-langchain
summary: End-to-end RAG template using Ollama embeddings + Llama 2 for retrieval and generation.
